  "findings": [
    "Missing hanger nails in multiple designated fastener holes of installed joist hangers."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install the correct size, type, and quantity of manufacturer-specified nails (e.g., Simpson Strong-Tie SD connector screws or specified common nails) in all empty hanger holes before framing inspection."
  ],
  "rationale": "Manufacturer specifications (Simpson Strong-Tie) and building codes (IRC/IBC) require all round and triangle holes in hangers to be filled with the specified fasteners to achieve the rated allowable load. Missing fasteners significantly reduce the shear and uplift capacity of the connection, posing a structural failure risk.",
  "references": [
    "Simpson Strong-Tie Wood Construction Connectors Catalog",
    "IRC Section R502.9",
    "IBC Section 2304.10"
  ]
}
